title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ selection does not persist after closing and reopening the EQ tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
5. Close the Equalizer tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping down.
6. Reopen the Equalizer by navigating back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
8. Repeat steps 4–7 for each remaining EQ value: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The previously selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists and is displayed as selected when the Equalizer tab is reopened.
